emails.body: Greg: I received the following email from RBC and am attaching a redline of changes. Since ECC will be signing, let me know if you have any objections. Sara Forwarded by Sara Shackleton/HOU/ECT on 12/12/2000 02:03 PM "Fleming, Blair <blair.fleming@rbcds.com> 12/08/2000 02:39 PM

emails.subject: Re: Alberta Gas Prepay and Assignment to BTM
emails.subject_base: Alberta Gas Prepay and Assignment to BTM
emails.body: Re: Alberta Gas Prepay and Assignment to BTM The consent looks fine to me. I am out of the office for the next two weeks, so if this needs to get executed before I return after Christmas, please send it to Peter and he can initial it for me and have it executed. Cheers Greg To:???? blair.fleming@rbcds.com
